name: What if symptoms from my injury showed up late - can ChatGPT help prove causation?

mainEntity.name: What if symptoms from my injury showed up late - can ChatGPT help prove causation?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, AI can't establish medical causation reliably; needs expert testimony.[1] General overviews only.[6] Key factors: Delayed symptoms complicate; pre-existing issues; documentation. See doctor/lawyer for records/timeline; avoid AI arguments. Build real evidence chain.
